name: announcement!
description:
Helloooo everybody!

So, lots of you have been messaging me about my absence. Nothing has happened! I'm totally alright, but I am actually facing employment (yuck)

I'm a full time student, i work 5 days a week, im applying to gradschool, and I also have an internship on the weekends. Though my job is amazing and I write full time, it's very very time consuming.

I'm not abandoning this platform or anything! I just genuinely have zero time to write and work on characters since I spend sooo much time working.

I love you all! 50K is legit insanity. Hopefully I can pump out some bots soon, sorry for being absent for #kinktober LMAO.

Thank you guys for all the concern! in the meantime, my mutuals write some amazing bots.

See you all soon. Have a very very safe halloween weekend!

xoxo, cerby
creator: C3rb3rus
